channel.title: Cybersecurity on nehwe.tech — Cybersecurity, Web Design & AI Automation in Colorado Springs, CO
channel.description: Recent content in Cybersecurity on nehwe.tech — Cybersecurity, Web Design & AI Automation in Colorado Springs, CO

item.title: CMMC Level 2 Readiness for a Defense Subcontractor
item.description: The engagement started with a two-day discovery sprint mapping their environment against every control family — access control, incident response, media protection, and so on. From there, the SSP and POA&M gave their leadership team something concrete to bring to their prime contractor: not just “we’re working on it,” but a dated plan with owners attached to each gap.
